prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次约19715→23411→20572→27577→30543，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约10828名；2025年基准约30543名，后移幅度较前几年明 显加大；2021-2025年物理类计划人数分别为171→181→172→175→178，总体小幅增长；2026年计划198人，较2025年增加20人（+11.2%），扩招幅度较大， 理论上竞争略有缓解，但扩招对位次的影响需结合其他因素综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第89名，近年排名稳定在84-92区 间，属于中上游211水平；长安大学在近年声誉监测中未见明显负面或正面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第83，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未 出现报考关注度异常升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，交通运输工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通工程、交通运输等招生专业 直接对应，是学校的核心优势领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热；土木建筑类热度分化观望；安徽省2026年高考总人 数约451000，较2025年（物理类+历史类合计约462179）略有下降，但物理类考生占比约69%，估算2026年物理类考生约313000人，较2025年320779人减少约2.4%，竞争压力略有缓 解2025年物理类本科批461分，较2024年465分略降，整体难度变化不大；长安大学位于陕西西安，属西部211，在安徽省招生占比约2.8%（2025 年），非本省高校，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移的强劲趋势、2026年物理类招生计划扩招20人（+11.2%）、安徽省物理类考生总数略有下降 、学校声誉平稳无异常波动等因素，在基准位次基础上小幅上调50名，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约32652名，区间32152-33152名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19715 → 23411 → 20572 → 27577 → 30543, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10828 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 30543, with a significantly larger backward shift compared to previous years; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 171 → 181 → 172 → 175 → 178, showing a slight overall increase; the 2026 plan is 198 students, an increase of 20 students (+11.2%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly, but the impact of expansion on rankings needs to be assessed in combination with other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 89th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 84-92 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; Chang'an University has not seen significant negative or positive public opinion events in recent reputation monitoring; ranked 83rd in Douyin comprehensive popularity, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a moderate level, showing no abnormal surge in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Transportation Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, and Transportation, representing the core advantageous field of the school.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be socially popular; Civil Engineering and Architecture majors show divided and cautious popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Gaokao is approximately 451,000, a slight decrease from 2025 (Physics + History categories combined about 462,179), but the proportion of Physics Category candidates is about 69%, with an estimated 313,000 Physics Category candidates in 2026, a decrease of about 2.4% from 320,779 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 461 points, slightly lower than 465 points in 2024, with little overall difficulty change; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 211 university, with an enrollment proportion in Anhui of about 2.8% (2025), not a local university, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous backward shift in historical rankings, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan expansion of 20 students (+11.2%), a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Anhui, and stable school reputation without abnormal fluctuations, the baseline ranking is adjusted upward by 50 places, predicting the 2026 Physics Category minimum admission ranking to be approximately 32652, with a range of 32152-33152.

Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (32152) are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Engineering Pilot Class Huawei Class, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range should focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Automation, Electronic Information, Vehicle Engineering, etc.), which are directly related to the school's A- advantageous disciplines and offer high cost-effectiveness; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (33152) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Civil Engineering, Materials, Architecture, etc.).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 4165 → 4285 → 4100 → 3756 → 4407, showing overall significant fluctuations without a clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 4407, notably lower than 2024; planned enrollment numbers for liberal arts/history category from 2021 to 2025 were 13 → 12 → 12 → 9 → 18, with a sharp increase to 18 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13, a decrease of 5 (-27.8%) from 2025, indicating a significant enrollment reduction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 89th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years; no significant negative or positive public opinion detected in recent reputation monitoring; Douyin popularity ranking 83rd, rated as 'average', with stable application attention; Transportation Engineering A- is the only A- or above discipline, but the liberal arts/history category majors (Law, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, Japanese, etc.) have no direct connection to this discipline, limiting the pull effect of advantageous disciplines on liberal arts applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social popularity is polarized and watched (slightly hot but competitive), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Business Administration is polarized and watched; total number of Anhui Gaokao examinees in 2026 is approximately 451,000, with an estimated 138,000 history category examinees, a decrease of about 2.4% from 141,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition; the 2025 history category undergraduate batch score is 477, up from 462 in 2024, indicating a slight increase in difficulty; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university, with a small liberal arts enrollment scale in Anhui (18 in 2025, 13 in 2026), limiting regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking decline, the significant enrollment reduction (-27.8%) in the 2026 history category, the slight decrease in Anhui history category examinees, and the polarization of liberal arts major popularity, a slight downward adjustment of 30 places from the baseline ranking is made, predicting the 2026 history category minimum admission ranking to be approximately 3643, with a range of 3143-4143.
